message:
fix(tests): silence dead_code warnings in test harness

- Add #[allow(dead_code)] to test infrastructure structs/enums:
  - MockBehavior, MockError, MockRequest, MockProxy fields/methods
  - TestHarness private fields (temp_dir, binary_path, listen_port)
- Add #![expect(dead_code)] to assertions.rs and fixtures.rs modules
- These are test utilities intended for future E2E test expansion

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
